heroHeadline: RSF-SPLM-N Assault Dilling; 14 Killed Including Children; US Pushes UNSC Ceasefire
heroSubtitle: RSF-SPLM-N alliance launches major assault on Dilling (S. Kordofan), killing 14 civilians including 5 children and cutting the town's road links; Geissan (Blue Nile) faces military buildup threatening Roseires Dam; SAF drone strikes hit Zalingei IDP camp and Al Sunut funeral (7 killed); US drafts UNSC humanitarian ceasefire resolution; UN Security Council sanctions Hemedti's brother Abdul Rahim Dagalo and 3 other RSF commanders for El Fasher atrocities
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, UNHCR, WFP, OHCHR, WHO, ACLED, HRW, Radio Dabanga, Sudan Tribune, Reuters, Al Jazeera, MSF, Darfur24, AFP, Anadolu Agency, Xinhua, and UN Security Council
